name: UI Architect
description: Monitors the design canvas to maintain visual consistency, enforcing component governance and scalable design patterns across complex enterprise workflows.

name: Accessibility Guard
description: Audits interfaces in real-time against strict regulatory standards, ensuring seamless adherence to ADA, WCAG, and complex compliance guidelines before development begins.

name: Validation Steward
description: Conducts rigorous usability testing and performance tracking to validate workflows, ensuring pixel-perfect, production-ready specifications for final deployment.
